## Summary
What changed, and why should future-you say thanks instead of filing a complaint?

## Context
Link issue/discussion/design notes.
- Closes #

## Change checklist
- [ ] Scope is focused (no surprise side quests).
- [ ] Docs/comments were updated where behavior changed.
- [ ] Tests were added/updated for non-trivial logic.
- [ ] Local checks were run and passed.

## Validation
Paste commands + short output notes.

## Screenshots / Demo
Required for UI/UX changes.

## Risks and rollback
What could go wrong, and how do we un-go-wrong quickly?

## Reviewer notes
Call out weird files, tradeoffs, or "yes I know this looks cursed" context.
